message:
feat(tests): add E2E test infrastructure with fixture and scenarios

Add comprehensive E2E (end-to-end) test suite for testing complete
user workflows in isolated environments.

Core infrastructure (tests/e2e/fixture.rs):
- E2EFixture: Isolated test environment with temp directories
- Checkpoint system for test debugging with state snapshots
- Step logging with timing for report generation
- Database state verification utilities
- Multi-layer skill directory setup (project, org, user)
- ms CLI execution helpers (init, index, run_ms)
- Automatic cleanup on test completion

Test scenarios:
- fresh_install.rs: Complete workflow from init → create skill →
  index → search. Validates the core happy path.
- skill_creation.rs: Skill creation and update workflows with
  validation of database state at each step.
- layer_conflict.rs: Multi-layer skill resolution testing.
  Currently focused on project layer with placeholders for full
  multi-layer support.

Design goals:
- Tests run in complete isolation (no shared state)
- Comprehensive logging for debugging failures
- Checkpoint snapshots for reproducing issues
- Uses --robot mode for predictable JSON output parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
